build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(62, 62, 25)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(15).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature for bolt circle — .workplane(offset=25).rect(52, 52).extrude(5)
